title: synotis otophylla
intro: Synotis otophylla, also known as the Himalayan synotis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Synotis otophylla include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, powder, or extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
